word: H4551 - מַסָּע - maççâʻ - mas-saw' - Before it was brought

sections.paragraph:
Original: מסּע

Transliteration: massâ‛

Phonetic: mas-saw'

BDB Definition:

  1. quarry, quarrying, breaking out (of stones)
  2. missile, dart

Origin: from H5265 in the sense of projecting

TWOT entry: 1380b,1381a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
